org.arakhne.neteditor.fig.shadow

Interface ShadowPainter

  • All Known Subinterfaces:
    BlockShadowPainter, EdgeShadowPainter, LinearFeatureShadowPainter, NodeShadowPainter
    All Known Implementing Classes:
    BlockDecorationFigure.SPainter, CircleNodeFigure.SPainter, ComposedShadowPainter, EdgeFigure.SPainter, NodeFigure.SPainter, PolylineFigure.SPainter, SquareNodeFigure.SPainter

    public interface ShadowPainter
    This interface represents any figure that may be drawn in a shadow mode. The shadow mode may be used when moving or resizing the figure.
    Version:
    17.0 2013-10-23 21:03:01
    Author:
    Stéphane GALLAND
    Maven Group Id:
    org.arakhne.neteditor
    Maven Artifact Id:
    neteditor-fig

    • Method Summary

      Methods 
      Modifier and Type Method and Description
      Rectangle2f getDamagedBounds()
      Replies the bounds of the area that must be redrawn according to this shadow object and all other related shadow object.
      Figure getFigure()
      Replies the associated figure.
      Rectangle2f getShadowBounds()
      Replies the bounds of the shadow object.
      UUID getUUID()
      Replies the UUID of the associated figure.
      void moveTo(float dx, float dy)
      Recompute the decoration with the specified translation.
      void paint(ViewGraphics2D g)
      Method to paint the associated figure in shadow mode.
      void release()
      Release any resource associated to this painter.

    • Method Detail

      • getUUID

        UUID getUUID()
        Replies the UUID of the associated figure.
        Returns:
        the UUID of the associated figure.

      • getFigure

        Figure getFigure()
        Replies the associated figure.
        Returns:
        the associated figure.

      • getShadowBounds

        Rectangle2f getShadowBounds()
        Replies the bounds of the shadow object.
        Returns:
        the bounds of the shadow object.

      • getDamagedBounds

        Rectangle2f getDamagedBounds()
        Replies the bounds of the area that must be redrawn according to this shadow object and all other related shadow object.
        Returns:
        the bounds of the shadow object.

      • paint

        void paint(ViewGraphics2D g)
        Method to paint the associated figure in shadow mode.
        Parameters:
        g - the graphic context.

      • release

        void release()
        Release any resource associated to this painter.

      • moveTo

        void moveTo(float dx,
          float dy)
        Recompute the decoration with the specified translation. This function does not change the original element.
        Parameters:
        dx - is the translation along x
        dy - is the translation along y
